LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER'S ROSANNA MYERS AMD KAMRAN SHAMAEI'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER PURSUANT TO CAL. CORP. CODE SECTION 709. CASE NOS. CGC-21-593519, CGC-22-598261 AND CPF-22-517835 ALL INVOLVE A BATTLE FOR CORPORATE CONTROL OF AUTOMATA RESEARCH, INC. THE CASES ALL INVOLVE NUMEROUS PRETRIAL MOTIONS RAISING DIFFICULT ISSUES THAT WILL BE TIME-CONSUMING TO RESOLVE. (CRC 3.400.) THUS, THE COURT DECIDES ON ITS OWN MOTION THAT THESE CIVIL ACTIONS ARE COMPLEX CASES. (CRC 3.403(B).) AN ORDER DESIGNATING CASES COMPLEX IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/RBU)

Order Granting Complex Designation and for Single Assignment

PURPOSES OF GENERATING COMPLEX DESIGNATION ORDER
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Single Assignment

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Pursuant To Cal. Corp. Code Section 709
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER'S ROSANNA MYERS amd KAMRAN SHAMAEI'S Motion For An Order Pursuant To Cal. Corp. Code Section 709.

Case Nos. CGC-21-593519, CGC-22-598261 and CPF-22-517835 all involve a battle for corporate control of Automata Research, Inc. The cases all involve numerous pretrial motions raising difficult issues that will be time-consuming to resolve. (CRC 3.400.) Thus, the court decides on its own motion that these civil actions are complex cases. (CRC 3.403(b).)

An order designating cases complex is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
